name: @intentsolutionsio/kobiton-automate
description: Connect to Kobiton mobile testing platform - manage devices, run automation suites, and view test results

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install kobiton-automate\\n  or /plugin install kobiton-automate@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
